---
title: 'Topos Consulting'
date: '2017-08-26T07:19:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2714944651793569124'
blogger_filename: '/2017/08/topos-consulting.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'disclosure'
---

<p dir="ltr">Hey, my name is Darrell Wolfe, and this is Topos Consulting. </p><p dir="ltr">I help individuals with passion strengthen their strategic position of opportunity and influence, so they can make a positive impact on their world.</p><p dir="ltr">Disclosure: I am a jack of all trades, matter of none. I am a wealth of random information.</p><p dir="ltr">I'm not a:<br>Tax Advisor<br>Investment Advisor<br>Legal Advisor<br>Etc....</p><p dir="ltr">The information here is meant to be informative, educational, and just passing along the lessons I've learned as I worked in various fields over many years.</p><p dir="ltr">I am a guy who's been around the block, seen and heard a lot, and knows a lot about a lot. Consider me a teacher of the things I know, but implement them at your own level of understanding and risk.</p>
